basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published on 26 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 30 years and hold B.Sc./M.Sc./M.Sc. Tech. in Geophysics/Geology/Engineering Geology/Earth Science or B.Tech./M.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Geotechnical Engineering/Mining Engineering/Rock Engineering/Earth Science with a valid GATE/NET qualification can now submit their applications via email on or before 08 June 2026. Direct links

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates will be provided as per Government of India (GoI) rules.

qualification.details: B.Sc./M.Sc./M.Sc. Tech. in Geophysics/Geology/Engineering Geology/Earth Science or B.Tech./M.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Geotechnical Engineering/Mining Engineering/Rock Engineering/Earth Science from a recognized University, IIT, NIT, Central/State University, or any reputed private engineering institution. The applicants must possess (B.Tech/M.Tech./M.E./M.Sc. or equivalent) in a relevant discipline with a valid GATE/NET qualification, as applicable. Preference will be given to candidates having research experience in the field of Rock Engineering, Tunneling, Mining engineering, Slope stability, Engineering geology.

selection_process: Email Application Submission Shortlisting Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Patna is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Sc./M.Sc./M.Sc. Tech. in Geophysics/Geology/Engineering Geology/Earth Science or B.Tech./M.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Geotechnical Engineering/Mining Engineering/Rock Engineering/Earth Science, along with a valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at IIT Patna in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA, as per the rules and regulations of IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Patna must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JRF posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow positions at IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves email application submission, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and an online interview for the final selection.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Patna JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Patna offer age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT Patna provides age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates as per the prevailing Government of India rules and regulations.
